inboxNudge.title: Inbox needs attention
inboxNudge.body: You have {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} waiting. A 5-minute sweep would clear the backlog.

reviewReminder.title: Time for your weekly review!
reviewReminder.body: Your {count}-week streak is on the line. 🔥

streakWarning.title: Quick heads-up
streakWarning.body: Do one small thing to keep your {count, plural, one {#-day} other {#-day}} streak alive.

streakCelebration.title: 🎉 {count}-day streak!
streakCelebration.body: You've built a real GTD habit.

projectDeadline.title: Project due tomorrow
projectDeadline.body: Your "{project}" project has {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}} remaining.
